text:
is a single by Megumi Hayashibara. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1310, it was released on 21 July 2010. https://vgmdb.net/album/27287 It contains the theme song of the pachinko game.

Tracklist

Staff

Track 01
Composition: Shirō Sagisu
Lyrics: Megumi Hayashibara, Mike Wyzgowski (Choir lyrics)
Arrangements: Shirō Sagisu
Vocals: Megumi Hayashibara
Orchestra: The London Studio Orchestra

Track 02
Composition: Shouichi Kaneko
Lyrics: Shouichi Kaneko
Arrangements: Shirō Sagisu
Vocals: Megumi Hayashibara
Orchestra: The London Studio Orchestra
